[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100000 1
1 0100000 1
2 1101000 3
3 0101010 3
4 0100110 3
5 0110101 4
6 0110000 2
7 0001000 1

23 32 0100000 1 match 0 1

56 65 0000010 1

70 07 0010000 1

13 31 0100000 1 match 0 1

61 16 0000110 2
